proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_044` is associated with higher `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_044` had a strong positive univariate association with `pfs_months`: +0.1759 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0008, z=220.12).
After adjustment for all other feature columns, the positive association remained: +0.1757 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0005, z=343.32).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-level increase in ordinal `feature_027` is associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_027` was strongly negative in a univariate model: -1.1800 months per one-level increase (SE 0.0156, z=-75.64).
The adjusted association stayed strongly negative: -1.1716 months per one-level increase (SE 0.0075, z=-155.90).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with binary `feature_039=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_039=0`.

analyses.code: Group mean contrast and OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_039
analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 3.6165 for `feature_039=1` versus 5.1528 for `feature_039=0`, a difference of -1.5363 months.
The adjusted coefficient for `feature_039=1` was -1.5488 months (SE 0.0111, z=-139.31).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with binary `feature_015=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015=0`.

analyses.code: Group mean contrast and OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_015
analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 3.7496 for `feature_015=1` versus 4.7998 for `feature_015=0`, a difference of -1.0502 months.
The adjusted coefficient for `feature_015=1` remained negative at -0.9825 months (SE 0.0168, z=-58.34).

The adjusted coefficient for `feature_046=1` was +1.1011 months (SE 0.0107, z=103.03).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with binary `feature_069=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_069=0`.

analyses.code: Group mean contrast and OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_069
analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 4.8645 for `feature_069=1` versus 4.2967 for `feature_069=0`, a difference of +0.5679 months.
The adjusted association was still positive: +0.5316 months (SE 0.0149, z=35.63).

analyses.code: Group mean contrast and OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_063

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 4.3281 for `feature_031=1` versus 4.8870 for `feature_031=0`, a difference of -0.5589 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_062` is associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_062` had a negative univariate slope of -0.0188 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0009, z=-20.53).
The adjusted slope was also negative: -0.0189 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0004, z=-45.13).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_004` is associated with higher `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_004` had a positive univariate slope of +0.4988 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0221, z=22.52).
The adjusted slope remained positive: +0.4752 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0102, z=46.79).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_037` is associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_037` had a negative univariate slope of -0.0747 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0029, z=-26.01).
The adjusted slope remained negative: -0.0769 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.0013, z=-58.24).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in continuous `feature_033` is associated with slightly lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_033` had a small negative univariate slope of -0.000507 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.000138, z=-3.67).
The adjusted slope was similar and statistically stronger: -0.000518 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.000063, z=-8.22).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The univariate positive association of binary `feature_025=1` with higher `pfs_months` attenuates to approximately zero after adjustment for all other feature columns.

analyses.code: Group mean contrast and OLS: pfs_months ~ 1 + feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Univariately, `feature_025=1` had mean `pfs_months` 4.7649 versus 4.6504 for `feature_025=0`, a +0.1144 month difference.
After full adjustment, the coefficient was near zero: +0.0017 months (SE 0.0113, z=0.15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for all other feature columns, patients with binary `feature_005=1` have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_005=0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_005=1` had an adjusted coefficient of -0.0936 months (SE 0.0372, z=-2.51).

analyses.result_summary: `feature_017` had a small adjusted positive slope of +0.00109 months per one-unit increase (SE 0.00054, z=2.00).

analyses.result_summary: `feature_059=1` had a small adjusted positive coefficient of +0.0334 months (SE 0.0170, z=1.97).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between binary `feature_046=1` and `pfs_months` is larger among patients with binary `feature_069=1` than among patients with `feature_069=0`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS interaction: pfs_months ~ all main effects + feature_069:feature_046
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_069 x feature_046` interaction was +1.5594 months (SE 0.0222, z=70.16). In raw cells, the `feature_046` difference was -0.0175 months when `feature_069=0` and +1.5770 months when `feature_069=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between binary `feature_046=1` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with binary `feature_063=1` than among patients with `feature_063=0`.
